meaning: adj.耳根软的,可建议的,容易受暗示影响的
examples: He was young and highly suggestible.
In this state, you are also highly suggestible.
Those people were more suggestible, and easily misled which in turn could affect their future.
It is equally critical, however, that we the people begin to understand our contribution to this tragedy and how suggestible and easily exploitable we are.
One of the things we learn about hypnosis from "Trance" is that 5% of the population is extremely suggestible, and will float in and out of a trance state.
